title: So do you think Anno will shave his beard for Rebuild
display_title: So do you think Anno will shave his beard for Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: So, do you think Anno will shave his beard for Rebuild?             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sat Feb 10, 2007 11:24 pm (assuming he still has it) I hope not. He has an epic beard. It must give him super powers.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sun Feb 11, 2007 2:43 am I bet he'll shave his dignity allright.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Feb 11, 2007 5:18 pm My rebuttal? Only if Gendou shaves his! :mrgreen: Now THAT would look weird.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 11, 2007 6:32 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Only if Gendou shaves his! :mrgreen: Now THAT would look weird.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Feb 11, 2007 7:13 pm Not really. It's just me being a dumbass. But seeing as this is generally the place to discuss Eva things with no real relavance to anything...
summary:
[]: So, do you think Anno will shave his beard for Rebuild?             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sat Feb 10, 2007 11:24 pm (assuming he still has it) I hope not. He has an epic beard. It must give him super powers.
